revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikipedia glossary/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Wikipedia glossary/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikipedia glossary/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Wikipedia glossary/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Wikipedia glossary/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Wikipedia glossary/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == Place {{tl|Wikipedia glossary}} on the pages of items linked from the [[Wikipedia:Glossary|glossary]]. {{strong|This template is not for use in mainspace (articles).}} Pages with this template are categorised into [[:Category:Wikipedia glossary items]], if they are in the "Wikipedia:" or "Help:" namespace. No category is used otherwise, since the placement of the template on a page in another namespace is probably an error. If a term in the glossary is defined in a "User:" namespace page, it can be categorised by adding the parameter {{para|category|yes}}. {{strong|This template is unrelated to [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Glossaries|encyclopedic glossary articles]]}}; for those, {{crossref|see [[Template:Glossary]]}}. === Providing a section link === {{tlx|1=Wikipedia glossary|2={{var|filed under}}}} e.g. {{tlx|1=Wikipedia glossary|2=BEANS}} gives (see far right): {{Wikipedia glossary|BEANS|nocat=yes}}{{clear|right}} This will link to the section by that name in the [[Wikipedia:Glossary]] page. The value provided must exactly match a heading or anchor name in the glossary page. E.g. a heading of ==Foo== or anchor of #Foo would be {{para||Foo}} in the template. If the name itself contain a = character (as in #Foo=bar), use {{para|1|Foo{{=}}bar}} in the template. === Category suppression === Addition of the page to [[:Category:Wikipedia glossary items]] can be suppressed (e.g. in template documentation, or on draft pages) with {{para|nocat|yes}} or {{para|category|no}}. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia namespace templates]] [[Category:Help namespace templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == Place {{tl|Wikipedia glossary}} on the pages of items linked from the [[Wikipedia:Glossary|glossary]]. {{strong|This template is not for use in mainspace (articles).}} Pages with this template are categorised into [[:Category:Wikipedia glossary items]], if they are in the "Wikipedia:" or "Help:" namespace. No category is used otherwise, since the placement of the template on a page in another namespace is probably an error. If a term in the glossary is defined in a "User:" namespace page, it can be categorised by adding the parameter {{para|category|yes}}. {{strong|This template is unrelated to [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Glossaries|encyclopedic glossary articles]]}}; for those, {{crossref|see [[Template:Glossary]]}}. === Providing a section link === {{tlx|1=Wikipedia glossary|2={{var|filed under}}}} e.g. {{tlx|1=Wikipedia glossary|2=BEANS}} gives (see far right): {{Wikipedia glossary|BEANS|nocat=yes}}{{clear|right}} This will link to the section by that name in the [[Wikipedia:Glossary]] page. The value provided must exactly match a heading or anchor name in the glossary page. E.g. a heading of ==Foo== or anchor of #Foo would be {{para||Foo}} in the template. If the name itself contain a = character (as in #Foo=bar), use {{para|1|Foo{{=}}bar}} in the template. === Category suppression === Addition of the page to [[:Category:Wikipedia glossary items]] can be suppressed (e.g. in template documentation, or on draft pages) with {{para|nocat|yes}} or {{para|category|no}}. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia namespace templates]] [[Category:Help namespace templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == Place {{tl|Wikipedia glossary}} on the pages of items linked from the [[Wikipedia:Glossary|glossary]]. {{strong|This template is not for use in mainspace (articles).}} Pages with this template are categorised into [[:Category:Wikipedia glossary items]], if they are in the "Wikipedia:" or "Help:" namespace. No category is used otherwise, since the placement of the template on a page in another namespace is probably an error. If a term in the glossary is defined in a "User:" namespace page, it can be categorised by adding the parameter {{para|category|yes}}. {{strong|This template is unrelated to [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Glossaries|encyclopedic glossary articles]]}}; for those, {{crossref|see [[Template:Glossary]]}}. === Providing a section link === {{tlx|1=Wikipedia glossary|2={{var|filed under}}}} e.g. {{tlx|1=Wikipedia glossary|2=BEANS}} gives (see far right): {{Wikipedia glossary|BEANS|nocat=yes}}{{clear|right}} This will link to the section by that name in the [[Wikipedia:Glossary]] page. The value provided must exactly match a heading or anchor name in the glossary page. E.g. a heading of ==Foo== or anchor of #Foo would be {{para||Foo}} in the template. If the name itself contain a = character (as in #Foo=bar), use {{para|1|Foo{{=}}bar}} in the template. === Category suppression === Addition of the page to [[:Category:Wikipedia glossary items]] can be suppressed (e.g. in template documentation, or on draft pages) with {{para|nocat|yes}} or {{para|category|no}}. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia namespace templates]] [[Category:Help namespace templates]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == Place {{tl|Wikipedia glossary}} on the pages of items linked from the [[Wikipedia:Glossary|glossary]]. {{strong|This template is not for use in mainspace (articles).}} Pages with this template are categorised into [[:Category:Wikipedia glossary items]], if they are in the "Wikipedia:" or "Help:" namespace. No category is used otherwise, since the placement of the template on a page in another namespace is probably an error. If a term in the glossary is defined in a "User:" namespace page, it can be categorised by adding the parameter {{para|category|yes}}. {{strong|This template is unrelated to [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Glossaries|encyclopedic glossary articles]]}}; for those, {{crossref|see [[Template:Glossary]]}}. === Providing a section link === {{tlx|1=Wikipedia glossary|2={{var|filed under}}}} e.g. {{tlx|1=Wikipedia glossary|2=BEANS}} gives (see far right): {{Wikipedia glossary|BEANS|nocat=yes}}{{clear|right}} This will link to the section by that name in the [[Wikipedia:Glossary]] page. The value provided must exactly match a heading or anchor name in the glossary page. E.g. a heading of ==Foo== or anchor of #Foo would be {{para||Foo}} in the template. If the name itself contain a = character (as in #Foo=bar), use {{para|1|Foo{{=}}bar}} in the template. === Category suppression === Addition of the page to [[:Category:Wikipedia glossary items]] can be suppressed (e.g. in template documentation, or on draft pages) with {{para|nocat|yes}} or {{para|category|no}}. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia namespace templates]] [[Category:Help namespace templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == Place {{tl|Wikipedia glossary}} on the pages of items linked from the [[Wikipedia:Glossary|glossary]]. {{strong|This template is not for use in mainspace (articles).}} Pages with this template are categorised into [[:Category:Wikipedia glossary items]], if they are in the "Wikipedia:" or "Help:" namespace. No category is used otherwise, since the placement of the template on a page in another namespace is probably an error. If a term in the glossary is defined in a "User:" namespace page, it can be categorised by adding the parameter {{para|category|yes}}. {{strong|This template is unrelated to [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Glossaries|encyclopedic glossary articles]]}}; for those, {{crossref|see [[Template:Glossary]]}}. === Providing a section link === {{tlx|1=Wikipedia glossary|2={{var|filed under}}}} e.g. {{tlx|1=Wikipedia glossary|2=BEANS}} gives (see far right): {{Wikipedia glossary|BEANS|nocat=yes}}{{clear|right}} This will link to the section by that name in the [[Wikipedia:Glossary]] page. The value provided must exactly match a heading or anchor name in the glossary page. E.g. a heading of ==Foo== or anchor of #Foo would be {{para||Foo}} in the template. If the name itself contain a = character (as in #Foo=bar), use {{para|1|Foo{{=}}bar}} in the template. === Category suppression === Addition of the page to [[:Category:Wikipedia glossary items]] can be suppressed (e.g. in template documentation, or on draft pages) with {{para|nocat|yes}} or {{para|category|no}}. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia namespace templates]] [[Category:Help namespace templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == Place {{tl|Wikipedia glossary}} on the pages of items linked from the [[Wikipedia:Glossary|glossary]]. {{strong|This template is not for use in mainspace (articles).}} Pages with this template are categorised into [[:Category:Wikipedia glossary items]], if they are in the "Wikipedia:" or "Help:" namespace. No category is used otherwise, since the placement of the template on a page in another namespace is probably an error. If a term in the glossary is defined in a "User:" namespace page, it can be categorised by adding the parameter {{para|category|yes}}. {{strong|This template is unrelated to [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Glossaries|encyclopedic glossary articles]]}}; for those, {{crossref|see [[Template:Glossary]]}}. === Providing a section link === {{tlx|1=Wikipedia glossary|2={{var|filed under}}}} e.g. {{tlx|1=Wikipedia glossary|2=BEANS}} gives (see far right): {{Wikipedia glossary|BEANS|nocat=yes}}{{clear|right}} This will link to the section by that name in the [[Wikipedia:Glossary]] page. The value provided must exactly match a heading or anchor name in the glossary page. E.g. a heading of ==Foo== or anchor of #Foo would be {{para||Foo}} in the template. If the name itself contain a = character (as in #Foo=bar), use {{para|1|Foo{{=}}bar}} in the template. === Category suppression === Addition of the page to [[:Category:Wikipedia glossary items]] can be suppressed (e.g. in template documentation, or on draft pages) with {{para|nocat|yes}} or {{para|category|no}}. {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Wikipedia namespace templates]] [[Category:Help namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == Place {{tl|Wikipedia glossary}} on the pages of items linked from the [[Wikipedia:Glossary|glossary]]. {{strong|This template is not for use in mainspace (articles).}} Pages with this template are categorised into [[:Category:Wikipedia glossary items]], if they are in the "Wikipedia:" or "Help:" namespace. No category is used otherwise, since the placement of the template on a page in another namespace is probably an error. If a term in the glossary is defined in a "User:" namespace page, it can be categorised by adding the parameter {{para|category|yes}}. {{strong|This template is unrelated to [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Glossaries|encyclopedic glossary articles]]}}; for those, {{crossref|see [[Template:Glossary]]}}. === Providing a section link === {{tlx|1=Wikipedia glossary|2={{var|filed under}}}} e.g. {{tlx|1=Wikipedia glossary|2=BEANS}} gives (see far right): {{Wikipedia glossary|BEANS|nocat=yes}}{{clear|right}} This will link to the section by that name in the [[Wikipedia:Glossary]] page. The value provided must exactly match a heading or anchor name in the glossary page. E.g. a heading of ==Foo== or anchor of #Foo would be {{para||Foo}} in the template. If the name itself contain a = character (as in #Foo=bar), use {{para|1|Foo{{=}}bar}} in the template. === Category suppression === Addition of the page to [[:Category:Wikipedia glossary items]] can be suppressed (e.g. in template documentation, or on draft pages) with {{para|nocat|yes}} or {{para|category|no}}. {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Wikipedia namespace templates]] [[Category:Help namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
